description: Expected protocol context for Vault contract

validation_rules.reason: Contract is a simple ETH vault with deposit/withdraw
Contract has owner (admin) and user (depositor) roles

optional_checks.reason: No external price feeds in this simple vault
Exa should find similar vault exploits

ground_truth.description: Simple ETH vault allowing deposits and withdrawals

roles.name: owner
roles.description: Contract admin with emergency withdraw capability

roles.name: user
roles.description: Regular user who can deposit and withdraw their funds

trust_assumptions: Owner is trusted to not abuse emergency functions
Users are responsible for securing their own addresses
Contract relies on ETH transfer success
